description: record a Playwright trace around a flow (tracing-start then tracing-stop; artifact)
rules: read-only — records a diagnostic trace, mutates no remote service
chained sub-steps: `playwright-cli tracing-start` then `tracing-stop` via the bundled npx wrapper
runs inside record_store so the trace artifact is contained
degrades gracefully: records when a live browser is not requested/available
usage: Optional PW_SESSION isolates the session. Output: trace.json (audit log; the trace artifact lands in record_store when live).
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + an already-open page; the start/stop wrap a flow you drive separately. Offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output.
